3119210.name: Growth
3119210.description:
After days on the run from the natural disasters in your hometown, you finally find a village, or at least an old house. An old... abandoned... house. However, you are too exhausted and go to sleep. After all, there's no better place to sleep, right?!

Plant fruit

Always the same...here are over 50 different fruits that you can grow throughout the game, so there's plenty of variety!

Keep animals

You can even breed animals! Not only can they eat, they are also very useful! So try to get them to your farm quickly!

Mining, exploration & fishing

If you're bored on the farm, try exploring the map, where you can discover caves and even find very rare items. And if you don't like caves or mountains, you can simply spend your time fishing in a body of water. There's even more than just fish, I promise!

Automation

Who hasn't experienced it? 1000 machines in the garden that have to be emptied. Millions of animals waiting for their food? A large part of the day is wasted just because you're providing supplies?

Not here! In the advanced game you have the possibility to fully automate the processes from the beginning to the end of a production chain!

Design your farm and your house

You can freely design your farm with various decorations, plants, machines or even stables. Let your creativity run wild.

Weather & day and night cycle

Not only the weather, but also the day and night cycle give the game a unique atmosphere. The time of day and the weather also have an influence on what happens in the game.

Do quests

You are not the only one with problems. Help your neighbors with various tasks. Maybe you'll even get a thank you for it? Who knows? Maybe there are also eastereggs in this game waiting to be found, but only maybe...
3119210.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语*, 泰语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
